texto: Like a handprint in cementAn indelible mark has been leftMy identity has been bentAt the point where your fingers pressed.Some people leave their marksAll over your identity
autor: Some leave beautiful artAnd others graffiti obscenities.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Some leave beautiful artAnd others graffiti obscenities.: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “Like a handprint in cementAn indelible mark has been leftMy identity has been bentAt the point wh…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, justin-wetch, bending-the-universe pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de termino e bending-the-universe.
